questions.question: 1 (a) A list of formulae is shown. Br 2 CO CO 2 CH 4 C 2 H 6 HCl KBr LiCl MgCl 2 O 2 SO 2 Answer the following questions using these formulae. Each formula may be used once, more than once or not at all. State which formula represents: (i) a compound that gives a red colour in a flame test ...........................................................................................
